title: ANC - changes are present after closing/opening the ANC tab
scenario: ANC level does not persist after closing and reopening the ANC settings tab in Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings.
Tap on ANC to open the ANC tab.
Set ANC to a specific value (e.g., High, Low, or Adaptive).
Close the ANC tab by tapping the back arrow or swiping back.
Reopen the ANC tab by navigating again: Device Settings → Audio Settings → ANC.
expected: The ANC value should remain as previously set (e.g., High, Low, or Adaptive).
